# programs.mypy

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `programs.mypy`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `programs.mypy.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable mypy. |
| `programs.mypy.package` | `null or package` | The mypy package to use. |
| `programs.mypy.settings` | `attribute set of section of an INI file (attrs of INI atom (null, bool, int, float or string))` | Configuration written to {file}`$XDG_CONFIG_HOME/mypy/config`. See <https://mypy.readthedocs.io/en/stable/config_file.html> for more information. |
